title: Ghostype
tagline: Cursor's Tab-autocomplete, except in Messages, Mail, and everywhere else you type. Learns your voice.

title: Habit Warden
tagline: A habit tracker that blocks your distractions and plays David Goggins at you when you slack off.

title: dropkit
tagline: AirDrop as a CLI: fleet fan-out, watch folders, live radar. Refuses to spam strangers on principle.

title: SpellFix
tagline: iPhone autocorrect for your Mac. Fixes teh → the in every app, leaves your lol alone.

title: DeepWorkScore
tagline: Scores your day 0–100 from what you worked on plus how well you prompted. Doom-scrolling costs points.

title: EyeSite Saver
tagline: Every 20 minutes it takes over your screen until you look 20 feet away for 20 seconds. Non-negotiable.

title: OpenClaw Warden
tagline: A parole officer for jailbroken local models: timed sessions, RAM checks, and a kill switch.

title: term-tile
tagline: One command and every terminal window snaps into a neat grid. Stdlib only, zero dependencies.

title: MathSnap
tagline: Drag-select any math problem on screen; Claude solves it and reads the answer aloud. Raycast-ready.

title: ReplyKey
tagline: An iOS keyboard with one extra key: ✨. Tap it and it writes your reply, in any app, for $0.
